com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration

Class GetPINBlock.GetPINBlockRequest

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.base.BaseRequest<ManageRequest>
      • com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.GetPINBlock.GetPINBlockRequest
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable
    Enclosing class:
    GetPINBlock

    public static class GetPINBlock.GetPINBlockRequest
extends BaseRequest<ManageRequest>
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      GetPINBlockRequest() 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.String getTitle() 
      protected ManageRequest pack() 
      void setAccountNumber(java.lang.String accountNumber)
      Account number.
      void setEdcType(java.lang.String edcType)
      See EDCType
      void setEncryptionType(java.lang.String pinEncryptionType)
      The value is as below:
      1: DUKPT.(DES DUKPT)
      2: Master Session DES
      3: AES DUKPT
      void setKeySlot(java.lang.String keySlot)
      Key slot number, start from 1.
      void setKsnFlag(java.lang.String ksnFlag)
      Indicate whether to increase KSN, when MAC key type is 1(DUKPT Key)
      void setPinAlgorithm(java.lang.String pinAlgorithm)
      When the Encryption Type is 1(DES DUKPT) or 2(Master Session DES):
      The value is as below, default to 0:
      0: ISO9564_0
      1: ISO9564_1
      3: ISO9564_3
      When the Encryption Type is 3(AES DUKPT):
      The value is as below, default to 4:
      4: ISO9564_4
      void setPinBypassFlag(java.lang.String pinBypassFlag)
      Default as 0.
      void setPinMaxLength(java.lang.String pinMaxLength)
      The value must be not less pin min length, and must be not more than 12.
      void setPinMinLength(java.lang.String pinMinLength)
      The value must be not less 4, and must be not more than pin max length.
      void setPinpadType(java.lang.String pinpadType)
      0: Internal Pinpad.(default)
      1: External Pinpad (A80 only, if use other device will return param error).
      2: RNIB Pinpad mode.
      3: External Pinpad first.
      void setTimeOut100ms(int timeOut)
      Should be [0, 3000]
      void setTitle(java.lang.String title)
      The title that to be displayed, default as “Amount: $0.00”.
      void setTransType(java.lang.String transType)
      See TransType

      • GetPINBlockRequest

        public GetPINBlockRequest()

    • Method Detail

      • setEdcType

        public void setEdcType(java.lang.String edcType)
        See EDCType
        Parameters:
        edcType - See EDCType

      • setTransType

        public void setTransType(java.lang.String transType)
        See TransType
        Parameters:
        transType - See TransType

      • setAccountNumber

        public void setAccountNumber(java.lang.String accountNumber)
        Account number.

        The account number must have a length between 13 and 19 characters.
        It's mandatory when the 'PIN Algorithm' is set to 0 (ISO9564_0) or 3 (ISO9564 3), with Encryption Type as 1 (DES DUKPT) or 2 (Master Session DES).
        Additionally, it's required for 4 (ISO9564_4) when the Encryption Type is 3 (AES DUKPT). When encryption is active, this value should be the masked PAN from the INPUTACCOUNTWITHEMV response.

        Parameters:
        accountNumber - accountNumber

      • setEncryptionType

        public void setEncryptionType(java.lang.String pinEncryptionType)
        The value is as below:
        1: DUKPT.(DES DUKPT)
        2: Master Session DES
        3: AES DUKPT
        Parameters:
        pinEncryptionType - The encryption type for PINBLOCK calculation. Default as 1.

      • setKeySlot

        public void setKeySlot(java.lang.String keySlot)
        Key slot number, start from 1. Default to 1.
        Pax Platform Pax Models Valid value
        MonitorS80,S300,S500,SP30,D210. 1-40(DES DUKPT and Master Session)
        Prolin D200,D220, S920,Q20,Q30,Px5,Px7. 1-99 (DES DUKPT and Master Session) 1-40(AES DUKPT)
        PayDroid A60, A80, A920, A930, Aries Series. 1-99 (DES DUKPT and Master Session) 1-40(AES DUKPT)
        Parameters:
        keySlot - Slot index of the key used to calculate PINBLOCK. start from 1. Default to 1

      • setPinMinLength

        public void setPinMinLength(java.lang.String pinMinLength)
        The value must be not less 4, and must be not more than pin max length. Default to 4.
        Parameters:
        pinMinLength - MIN length for PIN entry. Default to 4.

      • setPinMaxLength

        public void setPinMaxLength(java.lang.String pinMaxLength)
        The value must be not less pin min length, and must be not more than 12. Default to 12.
        Parameters:
        pinMaxLength - MAX length for PIN entry. Default to 12

      • setPinBypassFlag

        public void setPinBypassFlag(java.lang.String pinBypassFlag)
        Default as 0. Valid values:
        0 - Not allowed, 1 - Allowed.
        Parameters:
        pinBypassFlag - Flag indicates whether NULL PIN allowed during PIN entry.

      • setPinAlgorithm

        public void setPinAlgorithm(java.lang.String pinAlgorithm)
        When the Encryption Type is 1(DES DUKPT) or 2(Master Session DES):
        The value is as below, default to 0:
        0: ISO9564_0
        1: ISO9564_1
        3: ISO9564_3
        When the Encryption Type is 3(AES DUKPT):
        The value is as below, default to 4:
        4: ISO9564_4
        Parameters:
        pinAlgorithm - PIN Algorithm.

      • setTimeOut100ms

        public void setTimeOut100ms(int timeOut)
        Should be [0, 3000]
        Parameters:
        timeOut - in 0.1s

      • setTitle

        public void setTitle(java.lang.String title)
        The title that to be displayed, default as “Amount: $0.00”.
        Parameters:
        title - The title

      • getTitle

        public java.lang.String getTitle()

      • setPinpadType

        public void setPinpadType(java.lang.String pinpadType)
        0: Internal Pinpad.(default)
        1: External Pinpad (A80 only, if use other device will return param error).
        2: RNIB Pinpad mode.
        3: External Pinpad first. If external pinpad is present, use external pinpad. If not, use internal pinpad. (A80 only, if use other device will return param error).
        Parameters:
        pinpadType - Attribute: n1
        Since:
        V1.02.01

      • setKsnFlag

        public void setKsnFlag(java.lang.String ksnFlag)
        Indicate whether to increase KSN, when MAC key type is 1(DUKPT Key)

        Default KSN flag is 1(Increase)
        0: Not increase.
        1: Increase.

        Parameters:
        ksnFlag - Attribute: n1
        Since:
        V1.08.00

      • pack

        protected ManageRequest pack()
        Specified by:
        pack in class BaseRequest<ManageRequest>
